summary: Iteration 3 — anti-AI-slop pass regression. Backend pytest: 11/11 PASS (orders + contact CRUD, status transitions, validation). Frontend Playwright on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL: all critical flows green. GlassNav: brand image loads from RESTAURANT.logo (https://www.munchysgrillny.com/assets/logo2-f258ddec.png), all data-testids present (glass-nav, nav-brand-btn, nav-menu-btn, nav-story-btn, nav-visit-btn, nav-phone-link, nav-cart-btn). HeroPinned: real Munchy's interior banner renders on right, headline 'If you ain\'t here, you ain\'t munching.' visible left, solid bg-munchy red 'Order pickup' (no gradient), nav-menu/visit click scrolls correctly (scrollY 0→1727 for #menu, →7572 for #visit). MenuBento: all 8 categories render (starters, burgers, baguettes, shawarma, wraps, salads, platters, sides), sticky pill nav present, search filter works ('burger' → 4 burger items), .chip-dark price chips computed style = rgba(14,10,9,0.72) bg, 0px border (NO colored border-2), text rgba(255,252,246,0.95) — visually solid dark glass pill as required. Item modal opens, Add to cart triggers floating-cart-pill, cart sheet opens, Continue to checkout opens CheckoutForm, fill via [data-testid=checkout-name-input/checkout-phone-input], submit via checkout-submit-btn → order confirmation 'Thanks, TEST.' + 'Confirmation #B30B868B' rendered with totals (subtotal/tax/surcharge/total). Contact form (contact-name-input/email/message + submit) succeeds with thank-you state. Zero page errors, zero console errors during full run. NO yellow→orange gradient buttons remaining anywhere in components (grep confirmed: gradients only used for image overlays). NO border-2 on price chips. Toast POS is MOCKED — checkout opens 'Continue to Toast for payment' button on success screen but order is persisted server-side via POST /api/orders.

issues: The '©' (copyright) character in the Footer paragraph is technically Unicode Extended_Pictographic. Review request says 'NO emoji used anywhere' — © is a symbol, not a graphical emoji, so this is acceptable, but flagging in case the requirement is strict.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py PATCH route is /api/orders/{order_id} (not /api/orders/{order_id}/status as mentioned in review request). The current shape works and is RESTful — payload {status: ...}. No fix needed but worth noting for spec consistency.
Carry-over (iter 1/2): MenuBento scroll-spy still uses scroll-event + getBoundingClientRect for all categories every frame; consider IntersectionObserver for perf.
Carry-over: Mobile menu search input is hidden (hidden md:flex) — no mobile alternative.
Carry-over: 'String(8).padStart(2,0)' total category label is hardcoded to 8 instead of CATEGORIES.length.

Minor: In ItemModal/CheckoutForm/CartSheet there are several '.bg-charcoal' button duplicates with the same hover-translate styles — could be consolidated into a single button utility class to remove ~30 lines of duplicate Tailwind.
seed_data_creation: Created during this run: 1 order (TEST Buyer Iter3 / 5551113333 / Confirmation #B30B868B / $14.49 / pending) and 1 contact (TEST Contact Iter3 / test.iter3@example.com). Plus pytest fixtures created TEST Jane Doe order + TEST Contact contact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL https://munchy-glass.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py — run with 'cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml'. Key frontend testids: glass-nav, nav-{brand-btn|menu-btn|story-btn|visit-btn|phone-link|cart-btn}, hero-{order-btn|story-btn}, menu-sticky-nav, menu-cat-{starters|burgers|baguettes|shawarma|wraps|salads|platters|sides}, menu-search-input, menu-item-{id}, floating-cart-pill, checkout-{name-input|phone-input|notes-input|submit-btn}, contact-{name-input|email-input|message-input|submit-btn}. .chip-dark on price chips has 0px border + rgba(14,10,9,0.72) bg — verify these stay if CSS is rewritten again. PATCH /api/orders/{id} (NOT /status suffix) for status updates. Toast POS = MOCKED.
